meta.worldTime: Morning after the victory at the Old Watchtower

effects.name: herald's-radiance
effects.note: Radiant Rapier manifestation; exact mechanics TBD

embrace-your-destiny.objective: Understand and accept Maximus's celestial heritage and the Argent Legacy
embrace-your-destiny.clue: Pendant manifested Herald's Radiance and defended against a psychic attack
embrace-your-destiny.stake: Growth of power, identity, and destiny

apprenticeship-under-sybilla.objective: Train under Sybilla and learn the wider truth of Maximus's role
apprenticeship-under-sybilla.clue: Sybilla remains actively involved after the Blight's purification

investigate-source-of-the-blight.objective: Find and neutralize the source of the Blight
investigate-source-of-the-blight.clue: Heart of Blight purified at the Old Watchtower
investigate-source-of-the-blight.stake: Forest cleansed; Level 3 reached; loot recovered

unknown-blight-force.notes: Heart of Blight destroyed/purified; corrupted the Old Watchtower and Blight Wolves

clues: Mysterious shard recovered after Blight purification
obsidian-shard.hidden: Origin, purpose, whether corruptive or protective

tarnished-silver-locket.hidden: Identity of the elf; connection to the Argent Legacy or Blight

log.summary: Dawn after the Watchtower: party departed; Maximus studied the obsidian shard (origin still unknown).
Ambush in forest-of-allanar: combat began vs two goblins; Maximus landed a radiant hit on Goblin 1 (7->3 HP); Kiri spotted the flank. Fight ongoing.
